sql_array: CREATE TABLE partner_links (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), service VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, option_name VARCHAR(255), option_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO partner_links (id, name, service, option_name, option_value) VALUES (1, 'WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt', 'true');
INSERT INTO partner_links (id, name, service, option_name, option_value) VALUES (2, 'WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-log', 'false');
INSERT INTO partner_links (id, name, service, option_name, option_value) VALUES (3, 'WSSecho', 'service', 'timeout', '300');

SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt') AS option_value, bif:eval('SELECT service FROM partner_links WHERE name = ''WSSecho'' AND option_value = ''true''') AS service_eval;
SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS option_count FROM partner_links GROUP BY name HAVING option_count > 1;
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option(name, 'service', option_name) FROM partner_links WHERE option_value IS NULL OR LENGTH(option_value) = 0;

SELECT bif:eval('SELECT option_name FROM partner_links WHERE id = 1') AS active_option, BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', 'service', ACTIVE_OPTION) AS dynamic_option FROM partner_links WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, name FROM partner_links WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM partner_links WHERE service = 'service' AND option_value NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT option_value FROM partner_links));
SELECT BPEL.BPEL.plink_get_option('WSSecho', 'service', 'wss-in-encrypt') AS option_value, bif:eval(CONVERT('false' USING utf8)) AS eval_result FROM partner_links WHERE option_value = '';
